title: UAP Disclosure Tracker — Initial Publication
summary: Launched UAP Disclosure Tracker covering 79 years of UAP/UFO history from the 1947 Roswell incident through the 2026 Trump disclosure executive order. Tracker documents congressional hearings, whistleblower testimony, AARO investigations, and the ongoing institutional process of UAP disclosure. 6 KPIs, 5 contested claims, 10 key political figures, and a comprehensive timeline spanning 5 eras.
